chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: La FAFSA pide impuestos de mis padres, pero no hablo con ellos desde hace cinco anos.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: FAFSA asks for my parents' taxes, but I have not spoken to them in five years.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Lo siento mucho, Carlos. Podemos hacer una solicitud de Dependency Override. Ya abri el formulario. Cual es tu direccion actual?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I am very sorry, Carlos. We can submit a dependency override request. I opened the form. What is your current address?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando Florida 32821.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando Florida 32821.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Gracias. Ya complete la informacion independiente. Ahora necesito dos cartas de apoyo de profesionales.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you. I completed your independent student information. Now I need two professional support letters.

form_updates.new_value: 8810 Liberty View Dr Apt 5C, Orlando, FL 32821

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Subi carta de mi terapeuta, carta de mi arrendador y mi utility bill.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I uploaded my therapist letter, my landlord letter, and my utility bill.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Excelente. Ya extraje los nombres y telefonos de tus referencias. Ahora necesito como te mantienes economicamente.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Excellent. I extracted your references and phone numbers. Now I need to know how you support yourself financially.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Trabajo por horas en construccion, pago renta, comida y transporte yo solo.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I work hourly in construction and I pay rent, food, and transportation by myself.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Gracias. Cuanto pagas de renta al mes y desde cuando vives sin apoyo familiar?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you. How much rent do you pay monthly and since when have you lived without family support?

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Pago $1,050 por mes y llevo cinco anos sin apoyo de ellos.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: I pay $1,050 per month and I have had no support from them for five years.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Perfecto. Traduzco tu historia a ingles formal para la seccion Separation Details.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Perfect. I will translate your story into formal English for the Separation Details section.

form_updates.new_value: Student reports five-year estrangement, self-support through hourly construction work, and no parental contact.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Necesito reporte policial para aprobar esto?
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Do I need a police report for this to be approved?

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: No necesariamente. Tus dos cartas profesionales y evidencia de domicilio normalmente son suficientes para revision inicial.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Not necessarily. Your two professional letters and address evidence are usually enough for initial review.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Then let's continue. I want to submit it today.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
chat_conversation.message: Listo. El borrador esta preparado para envio y ya inclui tus referencias, direccion y declaracion traducida.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Done. The draft is ready for submission with your references, address, and translated statement included.

chat_conversation.speaker: student
chat_conversation.message: Gracias por explicarlo sin palabras complicadas.
chat_conversation.translated_message_en: Thank you for explaining this without complicated words.

chat_conversation.speaker: ai
